heroBody: Your secret key never leaves this device. We encrypt it locally before saving anything.
warning: Never share this. Do not lose it. We cannot recover it for you.
backupConfirmed: I have saved my secret key in a safe place.
unlockBody: Your profile is stored on this device. Enter the master password to decrypt it for this session.
createBody: Generate a fresh Nostr identity in the app.
importBody: Import your nsec, raw hex key, or seed phrase.
createPanelBody: Set a master password. We will encrypt your private key before saving it on this device.
secretPlaceholder: Paste your nsec, hex key, or seed phrase.
extensionWait: Waiting for your extension to respond…
signInNip55Desc: Use an external signer app on your device.
nsecWarning: Entering your private key in a browser reduces security. Use Amber or a Bunker when possible.
betaWarning: Beta — existing Nostr profiles may behave unexpectedly. IYKYK.
extensionNotInstalled: Install a Nostr browser extension (nos2x, Alby) to sign in.

runtime.invalidSecretInput: Invalid key format. Please try again.
runtime.missingVault: No saved profile found on this device.
runtime.unexpectedRevealError: Unable to reveal your secret key.
runtime.invalidWordCount: The phrase must consist of 12 or 24 words.
runtime.invalidMnemonicChecksum: Invalid phrase. Check the spelling of each word.

errors.secretRequired: Paste your nsec, hex key, or seed phrase.

mnemonicBackupBody: Write down these 12 words in order. You will need them to restore your account.
